title: One-Pot Chicken & Rice
description: A hearty, budget-friendly one-pot meal that feeds a family of four for under $10. Seasoned chicken thighs over fluffy rice with onions and garlic.
instructions: Season chicken drumsticks generously with salt and pepper.
Heat olive oil in a large pot or Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear chicken on all sides until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side. Remove and set aside.
In the same pot, saute diced onion until softened, about 3 minutes. Add garlic and cook 1 minute more.
Add rice and stir to coat in the oil. Pour in canned tomatoes and chicken broth.
Nestle the seared chicken on top of the rice. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 25 minutes until rice is fluffy and chicken is cooked through (165F internal).
Let rest 5 minutes, then serve hot.
tips: Use thighs instead of drumsticks for more tender meat.
Add a can of black beans for extra protein and fiber.
Leftovers keep well in the fridge for 3-4 days.
